title: Integrations
description: Connect your apps so your agent can act on them.
unavailable: Integrations are not available in this setup.

signin.title: Sign in to connect apps
signin.body: Sign in to Houston to connect your apps. Your accounts stay yours; the agent acts on your behalf.

reconnectNotice: We upgraded how apps connect to make it more secure. Please reconnect your apps once; Houston no longer keeps any long-lived key for them.

disconnect.confirmBody: Your agent will lose access to {{name}}. You can reconnect it anytime.

connectResult.timeout: The connection didn't finish. Please try again.
connectResult.failed: The app couldn't be connected. Please try again.
